title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra S Pen Replacement for Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra/Galaxy Tab S11 Stylus Pen for Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 5G/ S11 5G with Tips/Nibs (White)
features: Compatible Models: The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra S Pen Replacement compatible with Sumsung Galaxy Tab S11/ S11 Ultra. Please check your model before purchasing.

Precision & Fluidity: With 4096 pressure points, the Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra S Pen Replacement responds instantly to the lightest touch with no latency, helping you draw and shade with extreme precision.
High Quality: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra S Pen Replacement is 100% tested well before shipping out. 100% perfect S11 Touch Pen fit for Samsung Tab S11 / Galaxy S11 Ultra.

Efficiency: Designed for precision and accuracy, the Galaxy S11/ S11 Ultra Stylus Pen improves the way you work and play. You can use it to write, edit, doodle, sketch, color, and jot down notes on-the-go.

description: Product Description Compatibility The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra S Pen Replacement compatible with Sumsung Galaxy Tab S11/ S11 Ultra. Please check your model before purchasing. High Efficiency Crafted for perfect precision, the Galaxy S11/S11 Ultra Stylus Pen elevates your daily work and play. It lets you write, edit, draw, sketch, color and jot down quick notes effortlessly, whether you’re on the move or at your desk. 4096 Level Of Pressure Boasting 4096 pressure sensitivity levels, our replacement S Pen for Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra reacts right away to even the softest touch with zero delay. It lets you draw and add shading with pinpoint accuracy, making every creative stroke smooth and precise for your Galaxy tablet. Use-friendly Design Say goodbye to accidental screen taps and miswrites! Our professional palm rejection design lets you rest your palm/wrist freely on the touch screen while writing, drawing or note-taking, just like writing on real paper with zero interference.
